case_title: BELO, ADORACION VS SHAFI-NIA, M. SYAMAK ATTY.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BELO, ADORACION AS TO DEFENDANT SHAFI-NIA, M. SYAMAK ATTY. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
CERT MAIL TO ATTY. M. SYAMAK SHAFI-NIA RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELO, ADORACION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAFI-NIA, M. SYAMAK ATTY. $4,584.34 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,605.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO SYAMAK-SHAFI-NIA RETURNED UNABLE TO FORWARD.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $582.63 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SHAFI-NIA, M. SYAMAK ATTY.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEF. SHAFI-NIA, RET'D NOTIFY SENDER OF NEW ADDRESS.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEF. AT THE NEW ADDRESS IN BEVERLY HILLS.
